h1.visual_description: Bold, serif font, preceded by a numerical section identifier. Significant whitespace above and below.

h2.visual_description: Not present in sample, but likely bold serif with smaller indentation or size than h1.

visual_matchers.pattern: Superscript numerical digits within body text.
Small numerical digit followed by text at the bottom of the page, separated by a horizontal rule.
Text enclosed in angle brackets within footnotes.
visual_matchers.semantic_meaning: Code repository path or file identifier

markdown_grammar.math_environment: Inline LaTeX for variables (e.g., $PSS$, $SJ$); block LaTeX for complex equations (not shown but implied by academic style).
markdown_grammar.citation_format: Author-date parenthetical citations (e.g., Morgan, Grant, Melmoth, & Solomon, 2015).

layout_info.margin_noise_patterns: Top left: Page number (e.g., 322). Top right: Author surname in all caps (e.g., YARROW). Bottom: Footnotes below a short horizontal line.
